view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement 'Enroll once, attend multiple sessions' is satisfied based on the evidence provided.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement 'Enroll once, attend multiple sessions' is satisfied based on the evidence provided.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement by demonstrating that Sarah can enroll in the 'Yoga Teacher Training' program and attend multiple sessions, as evidenced by her attendance at 11 out of 12 sessions and her completion status. The linked use case explicitly states that Sarah enrolls once and is able to attend multiple sessions, confirming the requirement is met. Additionally, the system's functionality to allow makeup sessions further supports this validation.
